iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 auto - Hour 14 update: Hegseth confirms 7,000 targets struck in Iran, announces 'widest scope of attacks so far' today. Bessent provocatively suggests Kharg Island 'could become American asset' (90% of Iran oil exports). Saudi Aramco SAMREF refinery targeted in aerial attack (minimal impact). Two Kuwaiti oil refineries on fire from Iranian strikes. Fires burning at Qatar Ras Laffan LNG. IRGC evacuation orders remain. Energy war fully operational across Gulf. Updated 2026-03-19T14:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Hegseth: 7,000 targets struck in Iran, 'widest scope of attacks so far' today
latest_news.text: SecDef Hegseth confirms 7,000 targets struck in Iran since war began. Announces today will see 'the widest scope of attacks so far,' surpassing yesterday. Escalation in targeting tempo.

latest_news.headline: Bessent: Kharg Island 'could become an American asset'
latest_news.text: Treasury Secretary Bessent suggests Iran's Kharg Island (90% of oil exports) 'could become an American asset' after strikes. First explicit US interest in controlling Iranian oil infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Aramco SAMREF refinery targeted in aerial attack
latest_news.text: Iranian aerial attack targets Saudi Aramco SAMREF refinery at Red Sea port of Yanbu. Minimal impact reported. First direct strike on Saudi Aramco infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: Two Kuwaiti oil refineries on fire from Iranian strikes
latest_news.text: Iran strikes set two Kuwaiti oil refineries ablaze. Coordinated with Qatar Ras Laffan and Saudi SAMREF attacks.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 14 update: IDF strikes Litani River crossings used for Hezbollah weapons transfers. 912+ killed in Lebanon (100+ children). UN says attacks may amount to war crimes. No ceasefire signals. Operations continuing at full tempo. Updated 2026-03-19T14:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel demolishes 15-story building in central Beirut, 6+ killed in city strikes
latest_news.text: Israeli strikes destroy 15-story building in Bashoura, central Beirut. Hezbollah stored cash there per IDF. 6+ killed, dozens wounded across Lebanon overnight.

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah Al-Manar TV political director killed in central Beirut strike
latest_news.text: Mohammad Shari, director of political programs at Hezbollah-affiliated Al-Manar, killed with his wife in Israeli strike on Zuqaq al-Blat area. Children and grandchildren wounded.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, cutting southern Lebanon evacuation routes
latest_news.text: IDF strikes bridges across Litani River linking south Lebanon to north. Defense Minister Katz confirms. IDF says bridges used to transfer Hezbollah fighters/weapons. Evacuation routes cut.

latest_news.headline: 912+ killed in Lebanon since last Monday (100+ children) — UN says attacks may be war crimes
latest_news.text: Lebanon health ministry: 912+ killed since renewed attacks last Monday. 100+ children among dead. UN rights office says Israeli attacks 'may amount to war crimes'. Paramedic killed in Sidon strike.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 14 update: No new Turkey-specific developments. NATO Patriot deployment at Incirlik remains key hub. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey (Mar 4, 9, 13). Coupling from Iran conventional keeps Turkey at deterrent. Updated 2026-03-19T14:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 44% (stable). Day 20 auto - Hour 14 update: Eid ceasefire (5-day, Mar 18-23) holding. TTP announces separate 3-day ceasefire. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected with 'renewed intensity'. Updated 2026-03-19T14:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding — no fighting during Mar 18-23 window
latest_news.text: Eid al-Fitr ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. Both sides observing temporary truce. No reports of border clashes. Post-Eid resumption of hostilities expected.

top_signals: Hegseth: 7,000 targets struck, announces 'widest scope of attacks so far' today
Bessent suggests Kharg Island (90% Iran oil exports) 'could become American asset'
Saudi Aramco SAMREF refinery targeted in Iranian aerial attack

new: iran_conventional: uk_hormuz_coalition (weight 3) — UK military planners sent to CENTCOM Tampa for Hormuz reopening plans
iran_conventional: oil_above_120 confirmed active — Brent at $118, some benchmarks crossed $120
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: UK joins Hormuz planning — coalition forming slowly. Energy infrastructure targeting cycle deepening (Kuwait, Saudi, UAE, Qatar all hit). Iran threatens complete destruction if strikes continue. Trump waives Jones Act. 4th Palestinian killed. No ceasefire signals in any theater. Hegseth/Caine press conference scheduled 13:00 UTC. DNI Gabbard/Ratcliffe face House hearing today. Brent at $118, approaching $120. Watch: Iran nuclear doctrine — if rhetoric shifts from 'no change' to 'reconsidering', nuclear tracker jumps.

latest_news.headline: Saudi FM warns Iran patience 'not unlimited' — military response implied
latest_news.text: Saudi Foreign Minister warns Iran that Gulf states' patience is 'not unlimited' and they have 'significant capabilities' to respond. First explicit military response language from Riyadh.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes hit Tehran oil depot and refinery — capital targeted
latest_news.text: Smoke covers parts of Tehran after Israeli strikes hit oil depot and refinery in/near capital. Geographic expansion of Israeli targeting to Iran's capital city infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: Trump distances US from Israeli strikes on key Iranian gasfield
latest_news.text: Questions raised over US knowledge of Israeli plans to attack South Pars gasfield. Trump admin attempting to distance from Israeli targeting decisions on energy infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: US weighs sending thousands more troops to Middle East
latest_news.text: US weighs deploying thousands of additional troops to the region. Would further entrench US in the conflict but provides Trump with more military options.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon identifies 7th US service member killed in Iran war
latest_news.text: 7th US service member confirmed killed in Iran war operations. Cumulative US casualties mounting after 20 days of conflict.

latest_news.headline: Pakistani Taliban announces 3-day ceasefire — separate from state Eid truce
latest_news.text: Tehrik-i-Taliban Pakistan (TTP) announces separate 3-day ceasefire ahead of Eid, hours after Pakistan-Afghanistan state-level Eid pause declared.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 14:04 UTC) — (1) Hegseth confirms 7,000 targets struck, announces widest attack scope yet; (2) Bessent provocatively suggests seizing Kharg Island; (3) Saudi Aramco, Kuwaiti refineries, Qatar Ras Laffan all struck; (4) Oil/gas prices surging globally; (5) Arab/Muslim ministers coordinate unified response in Riyadh; (6) Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding; (7) Israel-Lebanon operations at full tempo; (8) No ceasefire signals in any major theater.
